import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaTrophy, FaUsers, FaDumbbell, FaClock, FaCheckCircle } from 'react-icons/fa'; import './About.css'; const About = () => { const stats = [ { icon: , number: '5000+', label: 'Happy Members' }, { icon: , number: '50+', label: 'Awards Won' }, { icon: , number: '100+', label: 'Equipment' }, { icon: , number: '15+', label: 'Years Experience' } ]; const values = [ { title: 'Excellence', description: 'We strive for excellence in everything we do, from our facilities to our training programs.' }, { title: 'Community', description: 'We foster a supportive and inclusive community where everyone feels welcome.' }, { title: 'Innovation', description: 'We continuously update our equipment and methods to provide the best fitness experience.' }, { title: 'Results', description: 'We are committed to helping our members achieve their fitness goals effectively.' } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

About PowerFit

Transforming lives through fitness since 2008

{/* Story Section */}

Our Story

PowerFit was founded in 2008 with a simple mission: to create a fitness center that welcomes everyone, regardless of their fitness level. What started as a small gym has grown into a premier fitness destination with state-of-the-art facilities.

Our founder, John Smith, was passionate about making fitness accessible to all. He believed that everyone deserves access to quality equipment, expert guidance, and a supportive community. This vision continues to drive everything we do at PowerFit.

Today, we're proud to serve over 5,000 members and have helped countless individuals transform their lives through fitness. Our team of certified trainers is dedicated to helping you achieve your goals, whether you're just starting out or training for competition.

{/* Stats Section */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.icon}

{stat.number}

{stat.label}

))}
{/* Mission Section */}

Our Mission

To empower individuals to achieve their fitness goals by providing exceptional facilities, expert guidance, and a supportive community that inspires and motivates.

Our Vision

To be the leading fitness center known for transforming lives and building a healthier, stronger community one member at a time.

  • Personalized fitness programs
  • Expert nutrition guidance
  • Supportive community environment
  • Continuous improvement and innovation
{/* Values Section */}

Our Values

The principles that guide everything we do

{values.map((value, index) => (

{value.title}

{value.description}

))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Join the PowerFit Family

Experience the difference of training at a gym that truly cares about your success. Start your fitness journey with us today!

View Membership Plans
); }; export default About;
